name: Sicilian Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the steak into serving pieces and pound thin.
2. Mix flour, salt, pepper in a shallow dish.
3. Dredge the meat in the mixture to coat evenly.
4. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
5. Brown the meat in batches until browned on all sides.
6. Pour off any excess fat from the pan.
7. Add tomatoes, oregano, mustard, parsley, and minced garlic to the pan.
8. Cover the skillet and simmer for about 1 hour, stirring occasionally.
